review_title: Team work and opportunities for learning
review_body_text: You are given KPIs to work on and your achievement will be well rewarded by Management. The hardest part of the job is to handle the multiple meetings and you have little times to work on your tasks.

review_title: Performance driven that lead to performance culture
review_body_text: Result oriented and performance driven organization which lead to performance driven culture and as a push power to go beyond limit and to actively look into opportunities.

review_title: Job work and life balance vry minimal. High target and need to work on saturday sunday.
review_body_text: Overall are satisfied. Good benefits and compensation. However, in terms of management in branch level sometimes staff not getting support. Job and life balance descreasing. Need to work on weekend to complete job.
cons_text: Job and life not balance, need to work on weekend.

review_body_text: I think the company cimb have a nice place to working because there enviroment all we this got in this company. The pays of comisen are higher i get in this company. Thanks

review_title: handling customer's enquiry, need to reach target KPI and SLA every month
review_body_text: environment is good even everyday dealing with difficult customer. leader always help and consult the team in order to avoid fatal and non fatal to achieve the KPI
cons_text: hard to get leave due to short headcounts.

review_body_text: Good place to work & develop myself. Better future. Looking forward to be here for longer years. Encourages more people to join as cimbians. Learnd a lot and would like to.learn more.

review_title: A good place for fresh graduate experienced
review_body_text: The jobs is to entertain walk in and online customers and give information about the items. Working from Monday from Friday from 8.30am to 5pm . What i have learned that i learned to know the behavior of customer by talking alot to the customer. The hardest part of the jobs is when there is no customers since its really need a hard marketing to promote your product

Actually, it's quite hard for me to adapt to this strict and stressful environment where I have to negotiate with customers peacefully to clear off their debt. But overall, it helps me very well to be more professional and discipline.

review_title: productive and fun workplace with free breakfast and high tea
review_body_text: - only at the first moment when i'm involved with contact centre. i have learn a lot how to solve and handling fussy customer and how to control my patience.even the management just ok but i love the culture at the contact centre. the hardest part of the job when handling fussy customer. for its quite challenging. however i really like it because it teach me a lot so that i can give more good services to the customer. last but not least , the enjoyable part of the job when a lot of my customer give me a good compliment and i am so happy for them.

The day at work is very nature with overall on the other person work in weekday. I learned many thing in my previous in term of the discipline and need to be careful on what we do in working. Systematic on management is the one of key point on becoming successful company.

Not a happy working environment. There are more grouping culture in this department. Cant get things done immediately even is urgent matter. I became demotivated to continue my target since mostly not willing to help.
-High Performance Working Culture -High comm if you are committed to your sales target and KPI -Must be able to well handel your work stress management -
pros_text: good comm and challenging working environment

review_body_text: good benefit like salary and insentif. the culture also good but lacking in term of the smoothness of the system and procedure available. the hardest part is too keep up with the new terms that we learnt through answering call from customer and dealing with their emotional respond.
If I have a chances to join this company for permanent jobs or position, I feel very thankful and glad because CIMB is the great company to work with.

Its been an honour for me, given this opportunity to work with cimb bank.. 😍😍. As a personal financial consultant, i learn so many great things in very exciting different ways of selling and promoting products to clients. The products offer to puclic is affordable and acceptable in the market. In incentive wise, I believe, cimb provides the best payout among other banks. Thanks cimb! I grown up so quick and happy to be as cimbians!

review_title: Fun work place with good friends.
review_body_text: Fun work place with good friends and willing to give hand when needed. Always help each others. My managers encourage me and help me find solutions to problems as a team. He also encourage me to grow and welcome my feedback and ideas. I am treated as an important member of the team.

This company is okay but Im still young and need to gain more experience especially in my related degree field. I have been working here for almost 5 years and its time for me to make a move for my future
Best place to work in terms of cultural, management, paying and benefits. A good benefit received in terms of medical, hospitalization where can covered to all your family members

CIMB's ethos is reflected in its promise to enable the dreams, ambitions and aspirations of all of our customers. Through our product and service solutions, digital innovations, extensive network and world-class advice, we advance the peoples, businesses and corporations of the ASEAN region towards their goals and enable them to move forward toward their true potentia

It provides a great learning curve for a junior to progress in the career. It is a very demanding job but fun to learn. However, compensation might be depending on the department and it might not be too rewarding for certain departments.
